title: Affair of Abu Qays
description: Al-Wagidi asserts that in this year, the first year of the Hijrah, Abd Qays b. al-Aslat came to the Messenger of God;32 the Messenger of God proposed Islam to him, and he said, "How excellent is that to which you call me! I will settle my affairs and then return to you." 'Abd Allah b. Ubayy33 met him and said to him, "By God, you are unwilling to fight the Khazraj!" So Abd Qays said, " I will not become a Muslim for a year." He died, however, in Dhd alQa'dah (which began May 7, 623). 30. Expedition of Safwan or Badr I: IH, 423; W,12.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 07
